userStories.title: Validate Docker Compose Configuration
userStories.description: Ensure docker-compose.yml is valid and all service definitions are correct

userStories.title: Start Infrastructure Services
userStories.description: Start PostgreSQL, Neo4j, Presidio, and Temporal services

userStories.title: Build and Start Backend
userStories.description: Build Go backend Docker image and start the service
acceptanceCriteria: Backend container starts and responds on port 8080
Backend connects to PostgreSQL and Neo4j

userStories.title: Build and Start Scanner
userStories.description: Build Python scanner Docker image and start the service
acceptanceCriteria: Scanner container starts and health check passes on port 5002

userStories.title: Build and Start Frontend
userStories.description: Build Next.js frontend Docker image and start the service
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend container starts and serves on port 3000
Frontend can communicate with backend via API rewrites

userStories.title: Full Platform Integration Test
userStories.description: Verify all services communicate correctly end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: No error logs in any service
Backend API responds to health check
